news.summary: Skillfully, a prominent company in skills-based hiring, has released a new suite of AI-powered products in San Francisco on February 20, 2025. This innovative offering assists employers in verifying candidates' skills, enabling them to enhance their hiring process and make quicker decisions. The advancement is aimed at facilitating more efficient hiring practices, ultimately benefiting both employers and job seekers.

news.headline: Survey by Lexia shows 60% district leaders unsatisfied with adolescent literacy programs' effectiveness.
news.summary: In Boston, it is reported that a significant number of school district leaders are dedicated to incorporating the principles of the science of reading into their teaching methods. A recent survey conducted by Lexia, a brand under Cambium Learning Group, revealed that 60% of these leaders express dissatisfaction with the performance of their existing adolescent literacy programs. The survey, carried out in the autumn of 2024, collected insights from district leaders who are actively working towards improving literacy programs. The detailed findings of the survey can be found in a report titled “Literacy Update: The State of Adolescent Literacy Programs”.

news.headline: Dozens of government employees combating foreign election interference have been reassigned or removed by Trump administration.
news.summary: Numerous government employees tasked with combating foreign election interference in the U.S. have been either reassigned or removed under the Trump administration. This action has affected several dozen individuals across various agencies, as confirmed by sources who are both current and former officials.

news.headline: Marie Brizard Wine & Spirits reported Q4 2024 and full-year 2024 revenues.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country. The total number of confirmed cases has surpassed 500,000, with over 10,000 deaths reported. Health officials are expressing concerns about the current situation and are urging the public to follow safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus. The rise in cases has also put a strain on hospitals, with over 70% of ICU beds currently occupied. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. Stay updated for more developments on this ongoing situation.

news.headline: Global data center storage market to reach $130.23 billion by 2031, growing at 11.2% CAGR from $54.67 billion in 2024.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, it was reported that the global market share for data center storage is poised for significant growth, with a projected CAGR of 11.2% between 2025 and 2031. The market was valued at $54.67 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach $130.23 billion by 2031. This exponential expansion indicates a promising future for the industry.

news.headline: Forge Institute launches Atomic Anvil with U.S. Air Force and Parallax to drive defense innovation, connecting researchers, startups, and non-traditional players.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, on February 20, 2025, Forge Institute, along with the U.S. Air Force and Parallax Advanced Research, unveiled Atomic Anvil. This groundbreaking program aims to expedite national security advancements by fostering collaboration between researchers, startups, and non-conventional organizations.

news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, on February 20, 2025, Sprayroq, a well-established company in the trenchless technology sector boasting more than three decades of proven reliability, introduced its cutting-edge creation: Polyurea AR-3400. This innovative polyurea solution is tailor-made for various applications, offering unparalleled performance.

news.headline: Hawaiian Electric Industries to report Q4 results; watch for updates on $4 billion Maui wildfire settlement.
news.summary: Hawaiian Electric Industries, Inc. (NYSE:HE) is scheduled to announce its Q4 results on Friday. The upcoming report will be closely monitored for insights into the company's financial status post the 2023 Maui wildfires and the associated legal proceedings. A recent development saw the Hawaii Supreme Court supporting Hawaiian Electric, barring insurers from suing implicated parties individually post-settlement. The overall settlement for the 2023 Maui wildfires exceeds $4 billion, with Hawaiian Electric Industries playing a significant role. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Amazon now has creative control over the James Bond franchise, previously held by a British family for decades.
news.summary: After maintaining sole control over the globe-trotting superspy for many years, a British family is now transferring ownership to Amazon.

news.headline: MellingMedical partners with Black Forest Medical Group to distribute neurosurgical products for federal health system.
news.summary: Alexandria, Virginia - On February 20, 2025, MellingMedical revealed a strategic partnership with Black Forest Medical Group, Inc. The collaboration aims to introduce Black Forest's cutting-edge neurosurgical products to the Federal Health System. This new distribution relationship signifies a significant opportunity for both companies to tap into the federal health market.

news.headline: Elizabeth Clement appointed as NCSC's 5th president. Former MI Supreme Court chief justice to lead organization.
news.summary: In Williamsburg, Virginia on February 20, 2025, the National Center for State Courts (NCSC) disclosed the selection of Elizabeth Clement as its fifth president and CEO. Clement, presently serving as the chief justice of the Michigan Supreme Court, will be stepping into her new role soon.

This change was approved by the company's Board of Directors. Service Corporation International is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SCI.

news.headline: Gemini Advanced Marketing Solutions in Edina, Minn., certified as a Women's Business Enterprise by WBDC-Midwest.
news.summary: Gemini Advanced Marketing Solutions, a comprehensive digital marketing agency based in Edina, Minnesota, has recently obtained national recognition as a Women's Business Enterprise. The prestigious certification was granted by WBDC-Midwest, a prominent regional certifying partner, signifying Gemini's commitment to gender diversity in business leadership. This certification reflects the agency's dedication to promoting opportunities for women in the industry. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP investigating ASP Isotopes Inc. (NASDAQ: ASPI) for shareholders; breach of fiduciary duties.

(NASDAQ: ASPI) on behalf of the shareholders of the company. The investigation aims to ascertain if the directors of ASP Isotopes have violated their fiduciary responsibilities in relation to the company.

news.headline: PMB and RUHS mark topping-out on $580M behavioral health campus in Mead Valley, California, offering 450,000 sq ft of care facilities - PRNewswire
news.summary: In Mead Valley, California, a new Wellness Village spanning 450,000 square feet is set to offer a range of behavioral health and wellness services, from urgent care to supportive housing. On February 20, 2025, Riverside University Health System (RUHS) and PMB came together with community leaders to commemorate this development.

news.headline: Telecom sector adopts AI: Survey by NVIDIA shows  impacts like higher revenue, lower costs, and improved customer service. RAN and generative AI gain traction.
news.summary: According to recent data gathered by NVIDIA, there is a noticeable trend of increased adoption of AI technology within the telecommunications sector. The integration of AI is proving to be highly beneficial for telecom companies, leading to boosted revenue, decreased operational costs, and enhanced overall customer satisfaction. Of particular interest are the applications of AI in Radio Access Networks (RAN) and generative AI, with a growing number of telecom firms showing significant interest in leveraging these technologies.

news.headline: Global Liquid Crystal on Silicon Market expected to reach USD 4.67B by 2034, with a 8.24% CAGR growth from 2025 to 2034.
news.summary: The article discusses the global Liquid Crystal on Silicon (LCoS) market, citing a Custom Market Insights report. The market was valued at around USD 2.3 billion in 2024, expected to reach USD 2.48 billion in 2025, and projected to hit approximately USD 4.67 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 8.24% from 2025 to 2034. The growth is attributed to increasing demand in automotive industries for heads-up displays and in various sectors such as projectors for applications in education and business. The report covers market details by product, technology, application, region, and key segments. The research report provides insights, competitive analysis, growth factors, and recent trends. Regional scope includes North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, South & Central America. The article offers access to a free sample report for further details.

news.summary: The organization is persistently acquiring Bitcoin as a component of its 21/21 initiative, aiming to secure $21 billion through debt and an additional $21 billion through equity to fund the purchase of the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Hiperwall launches Engage for improved team meeting productivity with up to 6 wireless content shares.
news.summary: Hiperwall, Inc. has introduced Engage, a cutting-edge technology that revolutionizes collaboration for both in-room and remote teams. This innovative system allows for up to six wireless content shares to be displayed simultaneously on a single in-room screen without the need for cables or dongles. Launching on February 20, 2025, in Mission Viejo, California, Engage promises a simple, seamless, and secure digital collaboration experience. With this new system, teams can effortlessly share and view content, enhancing productivity and communication.

news.headline: Levi's GranFondo will livestream "The Growler" race, the only long-distance live broadcast of a road bike race in N.A.
news.summary: The livestream production of the well-known road cycling event Levi's GranFondo will make history by being the sole long-distance live broadcast of a road bicycle race in North America. This event is held annually in Sonoma and is set to take place on February 20, 2025, in Windsor, California.

news.headline: Global modular data center market to reach $81.56 billion by 2031, growing at 17.9% CAGR from 2025. Valued at $30.27 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In New York on February 20, 2025, it was reported that the global modular data center market is poised for significant growth, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 17.9% from 2025 to 2031. The market was valued at $30.27 billion in 2024, and forecasts suggest a substantial increase to $81.56 billion by 2031. This rapid expansion signifies a promising outlook for the industry in the coming years.

news.headline: Nick Cerise named Chief Marketing Officer at Robert Half, to lead global marketing efforts.
news.summary: In Menlo Park, California on February 20, 2025, Robert Half, a global talent solutions and business consulting company, announced Nick Cerise as its new chief marketing officer. Cerise will lead the company's worldwide marketing efforts, managing digital and web marketing, as well as data analytics.

news.headline: Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) Q4 sales fell 8% YoY to $3.82 billion, missing estimates; net sales decreased by 8.8%.
news.summary: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) saw an increase in shares after releasing their fourth-quarter earnings report. The company experienced a sales decrease of 8% from the previous year, amounting to $3.82 billion, which fell short of the expected $3.90 billion as per analyst consensus. This decline was largely attributed to lower core organic sales and commodity deflation. Core organic net sales also dropped by 8.8%, with Multi-Family sales down by 29.1%, Single-Family by 6.8%, and Repair and Remodel/Other by 0.1%. Additionally, selling, general, and administrative expenses decreased by 4.6%. The gross profit saw a 15.7% decline, impacting the margin positively.

news.headline: Czech Central Bank Governor advocates for studying Bitcoin to improve financial expertise and proposes Bitcoin test portfolio.
news.summary: Aleš Michl, the governor of the Czech National Bank, underlined the significance of comprehending Bitcoin, suggesting that central bankers should familiarize themselves with it to enhance their knowledge of the changing financial landscape. He recommended establishing a Bitcoin test portfolio as part of a larger initiative to investigate alternative reserve management techniques. Michl highlighted that although cryptocurrency markets are highly speculative, Bitcoin should be evaluated separately from other digital assets. He stated that delving into Bitcoin would be beneficial and would bolster their understanding. Michl also introduced a plan to assess the viability of incorporating Bitcoin into reserve management strategies.
